case_title: YVONNE HINES VS. ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,049.22 FILED BY HINES, YVONNE AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: GREGORY TURNER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINES, YVONNE AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE/SEE SIGNED BY/RECD LINE** SERVED JUL-18-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HINES, YVONNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION $2,136.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,226.00, PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $534.00 - ONE THIRD (1/3) OF HER RENT FOR THE MONTHS OF JANUARY 2022 TO APRIL 2022 FOR THE BREACH OF QUIET ENJOYMENT. THE AWARD CAN BE MADE IN THE FORM OF A CREDIT TO THE PLAINTIFF'S RENT LEDGER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-09-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-05-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF YVONNE HINES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM HUTTON (OWNER) AND KEVIN BARR (SITE ADMINISTRATOR). DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AND WILL MOVE FORWARD WITH THE HEARING TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
